ddls:
CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the statistic (e.g., Statistics) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., Level, HP) */,
  "accepts_currency" INTEGER /* Indicates if the statistic accepts currency values */,
  "accepts_character" INTEGER /* Indicates if the statistic accepts character values */,
  "value_status" TEXT /* Status of the value (e.g., Not used, Active) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the statistic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the statistic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the statistic */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the statistic is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the statistic */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_versions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character type */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character type (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character type */,
  "character_type" TEXT /* Type of character (e.g., Alpha, Beta, Gamma) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical entry it belongs to */,
  "value_amount" REAL /* Amount of the value */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character associated */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of entry for the value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the value was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the value */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the value was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the value is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_values_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Finance, HR) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user (e.g., Data Analyst, Manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_statistics" (
  "report_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report statistic */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report it belongs to */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistic being reported */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_statistics_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_statistics_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id")
)
